subject: Kernel Runtime Proof - HARDEN Phase
body:
## Kernel Runtime Proof

- Executed runtime verification of key derivation and signing under load.
- Used canonical deriveKeyId (SHA256 DER) for key_id generation.
- Verified no signature mismatches under concurrent message flow.
- All assertions passed.

Key IDs verified:
- Kernel: 7f1a9fe931d1fbba
- Archivist: 147c5c2bb7d8941f
- Library: cb3e57dd7818da3d
- SwarmMind: 60afaa026a3d969d

System ready for convergence.
